violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a sanitizer bucket. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Bucket was removed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Raw animal foods (such as chicken breast) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked turkey) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables and prepared foods during storage. Food items were rearranged for proper storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Lobster meat was observed thawed in the 1-door reach-in with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items packaged in ROP shall be removed from original packaging prior to thawing to allow the reintroduction of oxygen into the food item. Food items were observed at 40-41 degrees Fahrenheit and were voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Proper thawing methods reviewed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the fryolator and walls behind the cookline have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
